Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Jesus Lopez.
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Bernell Hudson is present.
Attorney Laura Chiera representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JUN-25-2012 remains for settlement protected date.
